Book Now Location RATED 4.9 STARS Download Our App & earn $50 Today Click Here to Join Patient Testimonials Why Miami Loves Relax & Smile Dental Care Kirstie H. I am usually so nervous to go to the dentist but Relax and Smile is the first place I’ve been to that eased all my worries and made going to the dentist a thing I am excited for!. I’ve never even seen some of the machines they use here anywhere else! They even showed me a 3D model of my teeth currently, and how it will look after my Invisalign, I highly recommend them. Parkway C. Excellent experience with Dr. Cabrera I had a very positive experience with Dr. Cabrera. She is a very professional, kind, and patient dentist. She explained the entire procedure clearly and made me feel very comfortable throughout the appointment. I definitely recommend her if you're looking for a reliable dentist with a caring approach. Andre L. I chose Relax and Smile because I experienced a sudden dental emergency. I got an appointment the same day. The staff are friendly and experienced, and Dr. Santos assessed the problem and patiently explained what my options were. I have total confidence that she will execute a technically precise repair. Melanie M. Hands down the best dental office I’ve ever been to! The entire staff is beyond amazing so kind, professional, and truly make you feel at home from the moment you walk in. Special shoutout to Alex and Alejandro for going above and beyond every single time. I actually look forward to my appointments now. yes, it’s that good!!!! Alexandria H. This place is amazing. I’m from North Carolina & needed a dentist. Hadn’t had a proper cleaning in over 2 years. Needed a new bonding and they matched my color perfectly. Hands down best dental experience I’ve ever had. I would recommend this place for anyone especially if you need a dentist in town. Justin P. I had a GREAT experience at Relax and Smile. The staff is wonderful. Everyone was so friendly from Val at the front desk to Alejandro and Dr Ricart who provided excellent dental care overall. The facility is clean and the technology is modern. I highly recommend Relax and Smile! Adrian O. Great office they figured out my dental insurance. Super modern equipment and conveniently located near the first street station metromover stop Definitely recommend this spot if you are in the city. Very friendly staff. Whitney Wow, best dentist experience I’ve had in a while. I’m usually very anxious. Everyone was so nice and personable. Dr. Santos has great bedside manners, she’s very smart and knows exactly what to do. Happy I went this office. Very smooth process! Hannah P. They have so many skilled specialists who really do a great job explaining the process and have many payment options. The staff is warm and very professional. They were able to squeeze me in for several different issues in one week. Highly recommend. Rodrigo M. The staff is equally amazing—friendly, attentive, and always willing to go the extra mile. It’s clear they genuinely care about their patients. I highly recommend this dentist to anyone looking for exceptional dental care. Truly the best! Sebastian P. Excellent service and amazing stall all around. I felt welcomed and taken care of with the upmost respect, care, & friendliness. I would like thank to Fati, Val, Alejandro, and Kaylee for helping me with all the questions I had, and for the excellent care during the procedures. Amazing place! Carlos E. Best dentist in town. Our philosophy is simple: exceptional dental care begins with heart. From the moment you walk through our doors, you’ll discover a modern, elegant space designed to make you feel comfortable, understood, and valued. As a trusted dentist in Coral Gables, FL, right on Douglas Road, our mission is to redefine your dental experience through a personalized and compassionate approach. Every visit is built around genuine connection and trust—because we believe that great dentistry starts with truly listening to our patients. Whether you’re here for routine cleanings, cosmetic enhancements , advanced dental implants , or a complete smile transformation , our skilled team combines artistry with innovation to deliver results that inspire confidence. At Elite Smiles Dental Center, every detail—from our technology to our tranquil environment—is designed with your comfort, confidence, and lasting oral health in mind. We don’t just create beautiful smiles, we build relationships that make every patient feel like family. BOOK APPOINTMENT Premier Dental Services What We Offer For Our Patients Dental Implants Dental implants offer a long-lasting and natural-looking solution for missing teeth. They are firmly anchored to the jawbone, providing stability and preventing bone loss. Unlike dentures, implants allow you to eat and speak comfortably without worrying about discomfort. Additionally, implants can improve your smile and self-confidence, enhancing your overall quality of life. Her expertise in implants, cosmetic dentistry, and Invisalign ensures exceptional results. Patients choose her not only for her skill but for the personalized, compassionate approach she brings to every smile. Miami Dentist John Nelson Dr. Nelson has been a dentist for years and has been through several post graduate courses in different fields of dentistry. His emphasis on patient comfort as well as keeping up-to-date with the latest advancements in dentistry enable him to provide his patients with the best quality of care in the field. Dr. Nelson has a wide range of experience in different areas of dentistry, from cosmetic and restorative dentistry to surgical treatments and root canal treatments. His approach to your treatment starts with patiently listening to you. Then, after a complete and thorough examination, he reviews and discusses the diagnosis and treatment options with you.
